title: Nav Vertical
description: A vertical navigation list for primary app sections. Typically lives in a sidebar.
whenToUse: In the left sidebar of an application shell. When there are 4+ primary destinations.
whenNotToUse: For secondary or contextual navigation (use a list or tabs). On mobile without a collapsible shell.
acceptanceCriteria: Public API uses <udc-nav-vertical>, <udc-nav-item> Web Component tags.

states.name: default
states.description: Resting state for an inactive nav item.

states.name: hover
states.description: Pointer over an inactive nav item.

states.name: active
states.description: Pointer pressed on an inactive nav item (mouse-down).

states.name: selected
states.description: The current page indicator (driven by `aria-current="page"` or legacy `aria-selected="true"`).

_legacyAccessibilityNotes: Use <nav aria-label="Main"> on the container. aria-selected or aria-current="page" on the active item.
